messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this section of a document.
Focus on what questions this section can answer: topics, entities, dates,
definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, and evidence types.
Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

Section metadata:
{
  "node_id": "0137",
  "title": "南美地区 手游投放趋势观察",
  "page_index": 79,
  "page_range": "79-80"
}

Section text:
南美地区  手游投放趋势观察
广告主 素材数
66.0%
63.1%68.8%74.3% 73.3% 74.0%72.4%74.0%77.1%79.9%81.4%83.8%
0.0 K20.0 K40.0 K

月广告主数量 投放新素材广告主占比
79

message.content:
This section provides chart-derived data on mobile game advertising trends in South America, enabling retrieval for the following:
- **Topics & Entities:** South American mobile game market, advertiser activity, and ad creative deployment.
- **Dates:** Monthly time-series data spanning January through December.
- **Metrics:** Monthly advertiser counts (Y-axis scale: 0.0K–40.0K) and the monthly percentage of advertisers launching new ad creatives (Jan: 66.0%, Feb: 63.1%, Mar: 68.8%, Apr: 74.3%, May: 73.3%, Jun: 74.0%, Jul: 72.4%, Aug: 74.0%, Sep: 77.1%, Oct: 79.9%, Nov: 81.4%, Dec: 83.8%).
- **Claims/Trends:** The proportion of advertisers deploying new creatives demonstrates a consistent upward trend over the year, indicating increasing creative refresh rates in the region.
- **Evidence Type:** Figure/chart data presenting monthly volume and percentage trends.
- **Answerable Questions:** What is the monthly trend in mobile game advertiser volume in South America? How does the percentage of advertisers refreshing ad creatives change month-by-month? What are the specific monthly metrics for new creative adoption rates in the South American mobile gaming sector?
